name: sage
description: v0.2.0 — The meeting round-up: turns a stream of meeting transcripts into a single living weekly document that surfaces action items, tracks cross-meeting threads, and keeps a forward watch list. Pulls from Read.ai, Fireflies, or Granola via MCP; works on manually dropped transcripts for anything else. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace; self-contained and runs on its own.
